productDisplayName: Puma Men Foundation Polo Green T-shirt
description: Composition Green polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar with white and blue tipping, short sleeves with white and blue tipping, fabric tape detailing on the in-seam, buttoned chest placket, branding appliqué d on the front and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron on reverse This fabulous puma T-shirt has an exclusive casual style and a great look. The branding on the tee ups your style quotient, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or tracks and canvas shoes to look your best.
